summary: Completed comprehensive testing of restaurant admin config API and frontend UI. All features working as expected - config endpoint returns correct data for restaurant 478 (custom config) and defaults for non-existing restaurants. Frontend correctly renders all config-driven UI elements.

backend_api: GET /api/config/478 returns 200 with all config fields
Config has all visibility toggles (showCustomerDetails, showCallWaiter, showPayBill, showFooter, showAboutUs) all set to true
Config has correct branding fields (primaryColor=#F26B33, welcomeMessage='Welcome to 18March!', tagline='Crafted with passion, served with love')
Config has 3 banners with correct structure (id, bannerImage, bannerTitle, bannerOrder, bannerEnabled)
Default config has empty banners array
Default config has all visibility toggles set to true
frontend_ui: Landing page shows custom welcome message 'Welcome to 18March!' from config
Landing page shows tagline 'Crafted with passion, served with love' from config
Landing page shows config banner carousel with 3 banners
Browse Menu button uses config primary color #F26B33 (rgb(242, 107, 51))
Call Waiter button is visible (config showCallWaiter=true)
Pay Bill button is visible (config showPayBill=true)
Landing page Footer 'Powered by MyGenie' is visible (config showFooter=true)
Hamburger menu shows About Us option (config showAboutUs=true)
Menu page has Footer component (config showFooter=true)

seed_data_creation: Config for restaurant 478 already seeded via MongoDB with: primaryColor=#F26B33, welcomeMessage='Welcome to 18March!', tagline='Crafted with passion, served with love', 3 banners
context_for_next_testing_agent: Config API and frontend integration fully tested and working. Restaurant 478 has custom config, restaurant 999 returns defaults. All visibility toggles are functional. OTP verification accepts '1111' for testing.
